description_long: This is a weathered and aged food truck with a large, whimsical ice cream cone sculpture mounted on its roof, complete with a swirl of soft serve and two oversized cherries. The truck's exterior is predominantly blue and white, heavily mottled with green moss and rust, suggesting long-term exposure to the elements. The body features classic food truck elements such as a service window with an awning and a side panel, both showing signs of wear. The wheels are intact but also appear corroded, and the front windshield is clouded with grime. The overall structure is boxy and utilitarian, with a flat roof supporting the decorative ice cream cone. The truck exudes a retro, nostalgic charm, reminiscent of mid-20th-century street vendors.
description: A mossy, rusted food truck with a giant ice cream cone and cherries on its roof, featuring a faded blue and white exterior and a classic service window.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the windshield, front grill, and the large ice cream cone sculpture on the roof, with the service window and awning visible on the side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back of the truck, the full length of the roof sculpture, and the mossy, weathered surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back and right side, with the ice cream cone and cherries clearly visible atop the truck.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the front grill, windshield, and the right side, with the service window and the decorative roof elements in clear sight.
